name: gcat-artificial-space-objects
title: GCAT: General Catalog of Artificial Space Objects
description: Every artificial object ever launched into space — from Sputnik in 1957 to the present — catalogued by Jonathan McDowell. Includes launch date, country, object type (payload, rocket body, debris, component), orbit class, and current status.

licenses.name: odc-pddl
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Public Domain Dedication and License

sources.title: GCAT — Jonathan McDowell's General Catalog of Artificial Space Objects

resources.name: satcat
resources.title: Satellite Catalog (satcat)
resources.description: Standard catalog of all artificial space objects. One row per phase; most objects have a single phase. Covers all objects ever tracked in Earth orbit and beyond.

fields.name: jcat
fields.title: JCAT ID
fields.description: Jonathan's Catalog ID — unique GCAT identifier. Prefix letter indicates catalog (S = standard satcat).

fields.name: satcat
fields.title: NORAD Catalog Number
fields.description: US Space Force / NORAD catalog number. Not set for all objects.

fields.name: name
fields.title: Object Name
fields.description: Official or common name of the space object.

fields.name: launch_date
fields.title: Launch Date
fields.description: Date of launch (ISO 8601, YYYY-MM-DD). Partial dates (year only) appear when exact date is uncertain.

fields.name: launch_year
fields.title: Launch Year
fields.description: Four-digit launch year, extracted from launch_date. Suitable for aggregation.

fields.name: object_type
fields.title: Object Type
fields.description: Simplified object classification. Values: Payload, Rocket Body, Debris, Component, Suborbital Payload, Unknown. Derived from the GCAT SatType byte 1.

fields.name: state
fields.title: State
fields.description: ISO country code of the owning nation or organization (e.g. US, SU, CN, RU, FR). Historical codes like SU (Soviet Union) are preserved.

fields.name: owner
fields.title: Owner
fields.description: Abbreviated name of the owning organization or agency.

fields.name: status
fields.title: Status
fields.description: Current or final orbital status. Values: In Orbit, Decayed, Deorbited, Beyond Earth Orbit, Exploded.

fields.name: orbit_class
fields.title: Orbit Class
fields.description: Operational orbit category code (e.g. LEO/I, GEO/S, MEO, HEO). See https://planet4589.org/space/gcat/web/intro/orbits.html for definitions.

fields.name: perigee_km
fields.title: Perigee (km)
fields.description: Perigee altitude above Earth's surface in kilometres, at last known orbital epoch.

fields.name: apogee_km
fields.title: Apogee (km)
fields.description: Apogee altitude above Earth's surface in kilometres, at last known orbital epoch.

fields.name: inclination_deg
fields.title: Inclination (degrees)
fields.description: Orbital inclination in degrees, at last known orbital epoch.

resources.name: objects-per-year
resources.title: Objects Launched per Year by Type
resources.description: Pre-aggregated count of objects launched per year, broken down by object type. Used for the bar chart view.

fields.name: Rocket Body
fields.title: Rocket Bodies
fields.description: Number of rocket bodies (launch vehicle stages) tracked.

fields.name: Debris
fields.title: Debris
fields.description: Number of fragmentation debris pieces tracked.

views.name: objects-launched-per-year
views.title: 70 Years of Space Launches: Objects by Type per Year
